name: multi-field-overlay-brick-thin-features
description: Multi-Field scene with brickThinFeatures overlay enabled. Bricks where the SDF surface barely tangents (containsZeroCrossing && minSdf > -0.01) outlined in amber. Reads from cascadeManager.getBrickMetaMirror() (Stage 1 of ADR 0014). When the multi-field bug from Phase 11.4 is fixed, every field's bricks should contribute; today only the last-built field's bricks light up.
